title: Anaeat Fine Mesh Strainers - Stainless Steel Colander Sieve Sifters, with Durable Mesh and Sturdy Handle, Excellent for Sifting Dry Ingredients, Flour, Pastas, Rice, Tea (8cm+14cm+20cm)
features: Seal steel ring and long handle – made from durable, robust, polished, food-safe premium high-performance stainless steel with fine mesh. Our handle is attached to the strainer with a superior double riveted design that is safer. The extra long handle protects against scalding when fishing the noodle out of boiling water.

Save time and no waste: Anaeat sieves are made of extra fine mesh. This especially helps with quick sifting of dry ingredients such as baking and refining the texture of sauces as well as separating fine particles and seeds. Efficiently save time and no more wasting food.

Essential sieve for home, kitchen and shop – Anaeat sieves have 3 sizes of (8 cm, 14 cm, 22 cm). With them, you can do your tasks more efficiently, e.g. tea, coffee, flour, sugar, spices, rice, cocoa powder, lumpy baby porridge, ground oatmeal, frying, pasta, fruit, beans, vegetables, juice, etc.

Easy to clean and store – light enough to store or easy to hang. The polished, burr-free mesh strainer will not scratch your hands when you clean it. After use, put the fine mesh strainer in water and shake it gently or just put it in the dishwasher and you have a brand new strainer again.

Quality guarantee from the brand – quality speaks for itself. Anaeat focuses on developing kitchen utensils. We are so confident that we have the best strainers on the market. We strive very much for every order and offer our customers healthy and durable kitchen accessories.
